data.title: "ETH Plunges 23% in February, Worst Month Since 2018"
data.description:
Ethereum (ETH), the second-largest cryptocurrency by market capitalization, is on track for its worst February performance, with prices already down 23% this month. Historically, February has been a bullish month for ETH, with only one red month in 2018. However, this year seems to be an exception, as ETH struggles under intense market pressure and macroeconomic uncertainty.

At the time of writing, ETH was down 12% in the last 24 hours to $2387, mirroring a broader market sell-off. Bitcoin fell to $87,611, its lowest level since Nov. 15. Other cryptocurrencies also plummeted, with Ethereum, XRP, and Solana down sharply for the session.

According to CoinGlass data, more than $1.34 billion in bullish crypto positions were liquidated on derivatives markets in the last 24 hours. If ETH falls below $2,400, it could experience deeper losses, culminating in its worst February on record. With ETH trading below this key level, the focus is on where the price of ETH will go next.

Ali, a crypto analyst, suggests that one of the most critical support levels for Ethereum now sits at $2,300. A recent Glassnode analysis shows that the ETH Cost Basis Distribution (CBD) indicates investors have been accumulating on the way down. Accumulation zones show key support at $2,632, with 786,660 ETH held at this level and resistance at $3,149, where 1.22 million ETH are being held. This trend suggests that investors are averaging down, accumulating ETH at lower prices rather than completely exiting positions.

CryptoQuant CEO Ki Young Ju shares some bullish thoughts on ETH. First, there is no significant sell pressure post-Bybit hack, as on-chain and market data remain neutral. Exchange selling takes time, and OTC offloads have little effect on the price. Second, Ethereum controls 56% of the stablecoin market cap, with the possibility that firms may use ETH-based stablecoins and smart contracts more in 2025 due to a favorable regulatory outlook. With the Ethereum spot ETF already in

data.title: Bitcoin Plummets 7%: Critical Support Test Looms
data.description:
Bitcoin's price has plummeted by more than 7% in a single day, falling to $87,000 on February 25, its lowest level since November 2024. This sharp decline has pushed Bitcoin into a critical risk zone, sparking speculation about whether the breakdown is temporary or signals a deeper correction.

In this context, crypto analyst RLinda has highlighted key price levels that could potentially anchor Bitcoin's next major move. According to the analysis, Bitcoin is testing a key support range between $89,400 and $90,000, a crucial level that could determine its next major move. The analyst notes that on both daily and weekly timeframes, BTC remains in global consolidation, with the $90,000 to $91,000 zone acting as a strong support level.

On shorter timeframes, Bitcoin is hovering near local channel support, making this a decisive area for traders. If bulls hold the $89,400 to $90,000 zone, BTC could stage a rebound toward $94,000. However, if the level fails, a breakdown below $89,400 could accelerate selling pressure and open the door for further losses.

Recent price action shows BTC has broken below key support levels, invalidating previous bullish structures and pointing toward deeper retracements. However, the maiden cryptocurrency has since rebounded, trading at $89,040 at press time.

The analyst points to resistance levels at $94,800 and $99,200, while immediate support remains at $91,280 and $89,400. The market is now watching for confirmation of Bitcoin's next direction, with a stabilization above critical support levels seen as a key factor in regaining momentum.

Despite the market uncertainty, Founder of MN Capital Michael van de Poppe noted that the area between $83,000 and $87,000 could represent the "ultimate bottom case" before BTC begins rotating upward into a new bullish phase.

At press time, Bitcoin was trading at $89,014, marking a one-day loss of over 7% as selling pressure intensified. The decline follows persistent outflows from

data.title: Solana's Price Plummets 15% Amidst Ecosystem Challenges
data.description:
Solana's price has plummeted by 15% today, as the cryptocurrency's ecosystem faces a series of challenges. The decline in price coincides with a weakening of key metrics, including active users, core developers, commits, and decentralized exchange (DEX) volume. This raises the question of whether the SOL price will rebound from its highly oversold position.

SOL's price has been on a downward trajectory, with its market capitalization dropping from over $25 billion in January to $8.3 billion. This performance has led to a mass exodus of users from the network, with active users falling to 17.8 million, down from 37 million in November last year. Additionally, the number of core developers building on the Solana ecosystem has decreased to 24, down from 86 in August last year. The trend of declining code commits has also continued, with the number falling to a multi-month low of 32.

Solana's ecosystem is facing further headwinds, as daily fees have crashed to about $1 million, a significant drop from the year-to-date high of $44 million in January. The volume handled by Solana's DEX networks, such as Raydium and Orca, has also declined by 30% in the last seven days, further contributing to the network's woes.

Other factors contributing to the Solana price crash include the potential dumping of SOL holdings by Binance through Wintermute, an over-the-counter platform. Online users have noted that Wintermute withdrew $40 million worth of tokens from Binance, which could be seen as a bearish signal for the SOL price. This withdrawal occurred as Solana prepared for a 11.2 million token unlock on March 1, which is typically seen as a highly dilutive event for existing holders.

The daily chart of SOL reveals a significant price decline from near $300 in January to $140 today. The price has dropped below the important support level at $170, the neckline of a double-top-like pattern at $263. This pattern often leads to a strong bearish breakdown. Furthermore, Solana is on the verge of forming a death cross pattern, as the spread between the 50-day and 200-day moving averages narrows. This pattern often signals a significant drop in

data.title: TNF Pharmaceuticals Initiates Phase 2b Clinical Trial of First Oral TNF-Alpha Inhibitor
data.description:
TNF Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (Nasdaq: TNFA), a clinical stage biopharmaceutical company committed to developing novel oral therapies for autoimmune and inflammatory conditions, has initiated a Phase 2b clinical trial of its lead drug candidate, isomyosamine (MYMD-1), as a treatment for chronic inflammation associated with muscle loss (frailty or sarcopenia) in patients who have undergone hip or femur fracture repair surgery. This marks an important milestone in the company's mission to develop a novel science for immuno-metabolic regulation and increased longevity.

The Phase 2b trial is a randomized, placebo-controlled, double-blind study involving 60 patients who will be treated with isomyosamine or placebo for up to 90 days after surgery. The study aims to measure the extent and time course of recovery, comparing active dosing to placebo, to evaluate functional improvement. The primary endpoint is the change in muscle mass and strength from baseline to day 90, as assessed by dual-energy X-ray absorptiometry (DXA) and isokinetic dynamometry, respectively.

The initiation of this trial comes on the heels of positive results achieved in an earlier Phase 2a trial, which demonstrated the safety and efficacy of isomyosamine in reducing inflammation and preserving muscle mass in patients with sarcopenia. The global market value for TNF inhibitors was estimated to be $39.7 billion in 2024, with an expected CAGR of 3.6% for the next five years, reaching $47.3 billion by 2029. The introduction of an oral TNF-alpha inhibitor like isomyosamine has the potential to significantly impact this market by offering a more convenient, cost-effective, and potentially safer treatment option for patients.

The Phase 2b trial is being conducted at the University of Florida, in collaboration with Renova Health, a leading innovator supporting superior healthcare outcomes. The study aims to further explore the efficacy of isomyosamine in preventing progressive muscle loss and frailty in patients undergoing hip or femur fracture repair surgery. The results of this trial will provide valuable insights into the potential of isomyosamine as a treatment for chronic inflammation associated with muscle loss and frailty, and could open up a new market for the drug, contributing to the estimated $40+ billion TNF inhibitor market.

In conclusion, the initiation of the Phase 2b clinical trial of isomyosamine represents a significant step forward in the development of a novel oral TNF-alpha inhibitor for the treatment of chronic inflammation associated with muscle loss. With a growing market for TNF inhibitors and the potential for an oral treatment option to offer improved patient convenience and adherence, the success of this trial could have a substantial impact on the market and on the lives of patients affected by sarcopenia and frailty.

data.title: "Hoskinson: Crypto 'Paperhands' Panic as ADA Drops 13%
data.description:
Charles Hoskinson, the founder of Cardano (ADA), has recently shared his insights on the cryptocurrency market's recent downturn, emphasizing the strength of its fundamentals despite ongoing sell-offs. He expressed his surprise at the behavior of traders, who seem to be liquidating their holdings prematurely, even as market indicators remain stable.

Hoskinson criticized the actions of what he referred to as "paperhands" investors, who panic and sell off their assets at the first sign of market fluctuations. He compared their behavior to that of a "five-year-old throwing tantrums on the supermarket floor," highlighting their immaturity in handling market stress. He advised investors to prioritize the inherent fundamentals of the crypto market over fleeting emotions and to hold onto their investments during turbulent times for long-term success.

The recent price drop of ADA has been closely linked to the broader market upheaval, with the cryptocurrency suffering a dramatic decline of approximately 13.38% within a 24-hour span. This downturn is alarming, especially considering that ADA had shown promise earlier in the week, moving towards a critical price threshold of $1. The anticipation of this pivotal moment fueled investor optimism, which was abruptly quashed by market volatility.

Analysts from JPMorgan have also issued warnings of a potential correction in the cryptocurrency market, underscoring the necessity for investors to remain vigilant and informed in navigating these turbulent waters. As the market continues to ebb and flow, the resilience and adaptation of projects like Cardano could play a crucial role in investor confidence moving forward. For ADA, recovery could hinge on factors such as technological advancements within the Cardano ecosystem, upcoming developments, and the overall macroeconomic landscape.

In conclusion, Charles Hoskinson's remarks serve as a critical reminder for investors to rely on fundamentals rather than emotions, especially amidst a market rich with potential. With ADA experiencing notable volatility, stakeholders should remain cautious yet optimistic about the future landscape of cryptocurrency and the value of steadfast investment strategies.

data.title: Grayscale Seeks SEC Approval for Polkadot ETF
data.description:
Grayscale Investments, a prominent crypto asset management firm, has filed a formal request with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) to list and trade shares of the Grayscale Polkadot Trust (DOT). This move adds Polkadot's DOT token to Grayscale's portfolio of offered funds, which already includes Bitcoin and Ethereum ETFs.

The filing, submitted via a Form 19b-4, initiates a 45-day review period for the SEC to acknowledge the application. During this period, the regulator can approve, disapprove, or extend the review period for the proposed ETF. This process is a significant step towards bringing a Polkadot ETF to the market, subject to regulatory approval.

Grayscale's latest filing comes amidst a series of applications to the SEC for new crypto ETFs. In recent weeks, the company has submitted proposals to convert its XRP Trust into an exchange-traded fund and to list a spot Cardano ETF. These filings reflect a shift in the SEC's approach towards the digital asset industry under the Trump administration, with the regulator dropping numerous crypto-related investigations.

Notably, this is the first time Grayscale has sought to offer a standalone Polkadot product. The filing places Grayscale in competition with 21Shares, another crypto asset manager that recently filed to list a spot Polkadot ETF with the SEC.

At the time of writing, Polkadot's DOT token is trading at $4.4, having lost 6.7% of its value in the last 24-hour period. This decline is part of a broader cryptocurrency market downturn, reflecting the volatile nature of the digital asset landscape.

data.title: Top Rated Stocks | Are You Ready To Catch Up The 'Golden Momentum' In The Stock Market?
data.description:
Gold has reached a new record high, but this does not mean there are no more big opportunities correlated with this precious metal. In our view, the next big deal is hiding in plain sight - the stock market, because this company is truly poised to capitalize on this golden momentum and prove itself to be the perfect bet in a shifting economic landscape.

HERE ARE OUR PICKS FOR THIS WEEK!

----------------------------------------------------------

Newmont Corporation (NEM): Gold's Glimmer Amidst Volatility

Current Share Price: $44.04 

Market Capitalization: $49.31B 

Median Target Price: $52.50

Recommendation: Buy

Newmont Corporation (NEM) is a leading gold mining company, renowned for its expansive operations across multiple continents, significantly influencing the global supply of this precious metal.

Financially, Newmont stands robust with total revenue reaching $18.68 billion, reflecting a remarkable revenue growth of 42.8%. Gross profits are substantial at $9.39 billion, yielding a gross margin of 50.27%, while the EBITDA margins stand at an impressive 46.71%, demonstrating high operational efficiency. The operating margins are also strong at 40.85%.

Newmont's liquidity position is noteworthy, with total cash reserves of $3.64 billion ($3.21 per share) and a formidable operating cash flow of $6.36 billion. However, the company carries a significant debt load, with total debt amounting to $8.97 billion, resulting in a debt-to-equity ratio of 29.80%.

The company showcases positive profitability metrics with a return on assets (ROA) of 6.61% and a return on equity (ROE) of 11.17%, highlighting effective asset and equity management. Profit margins are strong at 17.92%, signaling an effective cost structure and profitability.

Analysts recommend a Buy rating with a mean score of 1.95. Price targets range from $45.00 to $65.43, with the median target set at $52.50. The market sentiment is positive about Newmont's ability to navigate market volatility and continue delivering strong financial performance.

Newmont Corporation offers a stable investment opportunity in the often volatile mining sector, fortified by its robust financials, operational efficiency, and significant market position, making it an attractive choice for investors seeking exposure to precious metals.

FactSet Research Systems Inc. (FDS): Data Powerhouse in Financial Analytics

Current Share Price: $461.56 

Market Capitalization: $17.50B 

Median Target Price: $486.00

Recommendation: Hold

FactSet Research Systems Inc. (FDS) is a premier provider of financial data and analytics, servicing global investment professionals with comprehensive data solutions integrated with advanced technology.

Financially, FactSet exhibits steady performance with total revenue reaching $2.23 billion, reflecting a revenue growth of 4.9%. Gross profits stand at $1.21 billion, translating to a gross margin of 54.29%, while the EBITDA margins are substantial at 38.03%, demonstrating effective operational efficiency. The operating margins are strong at 34.25%.

FactSet maintains a solid liquidity position with total cash reserves of $358.79 million ($9.43 per share) and a healthy operating cash flow of $631.57 million. The company holds moderate debt, with total debt amounting to $1.55 billion, resulting in a debt-to-equity ratio of 77.93%.

The company showcases commendable profitability metrics with a return on assets (ROA) of 11.16% and a return on equity (ROE) of 29.17%, indicating effective management of its assets and equity. Profit margins are robust at 24.16%, highlighting the strong profitability inherent in its business model.

Analysts have issued a Hold recommendation with a mean rating of 3.29. Price targets vary from $390.00 to $536.00, with the median target set at $486.00. The market sentiment reflects cautious optimism towards FactSet's continued growth amidst market challenges.

FactSet Research Systems Inc. remains a formidable player in the financial analytics sector, supported by steady revenue growth, strong profitability, and a well-structured financial position. It is a viable option for investors seeking exposure to the financial data and analytics market.

data.title: Graphs Worth 1000 Words: U.S Stocks Lose Steam as China Tech Takes Lead
data.description:
A Graph is worth a 1,000 words—let's take a look at some intriguing charts!

The unstoppable rally in U.S. stocks seems to be losing steam this year. The three major U.S. indices have posted only single-digit gains, underperforming both Chinese and European assets.

Adding to concerns, insider selling in U.S. stocks has been rising steadily, signaling that corporate executives are cashing out aggressively.

The 10 largest U.S. stock ETFs have recently seen a sharp outflow of funds, indicating that investors may be rotating out of U.S. equities.

Meanwhile, Chinese internet ETFs listed in the U.S. have recorded strong inflows. Led by Alibaba, Chinese tech stocks are gaining traction and may soon take over the leadership role previously held by the Magnificent 7.

Macro Outlook: Inflation Fears & Fed Policy

On the macro front, long-term U.S. inflation expectations for the next 5–10 years have climbed to a 30-year high, driven by Trump's aggressive tariff policies. The hotter-than-expected January CPI report has also cast doubt on Fed rate cuts this year.

Signs of Recovery in China's Real Estate Market

China's real estate sector is showing early signs of stabilization and recovery. Developers are once again bidding aggressively for land, reflecting a return of confidence in the property market.

According to China Index Academy, 37% of land transactions worth over ¥1 billion(approximate $0.138 Bln) this year were sold at premiums exceeding 20%. This marks a significant rebound from just 14% in 2024 and under 5% in 2023. For comparison, during the real estate boom of 2017, this figure surpassed 60%!

Notably, over 60% of developers purchasing land at premiums are state-backed enterprises (SOBs). With major private developers like Evergrande and Country Garden facing severe financial distress, SOBs have stepped in decisively to stabilize market confidence. Since the property downturn began in 2021, SOBs have consistently accounted for more than 50% of premium land acquisitions.

data.title: DeepSeek Looks To Launch Its New AI Model Earlier Than Expected
data.description:
According to the media report, DeepSeek is planning to accelerate the release of its next-generation AI model, R2.

Sources familiar with the matter revealed that R2 was originally scheduled for release in early May, but the company now aims to launch it sooner. DeepSeek stated that the new model will feature improvements in programming capabilities and multilingual reasoning.

Vijayasimha Alilughatta, Chief Operating Officer of Indian tech service provider Zensar, believes that "The launch of DeepSeek's R2 model could be a pivotal moment in the AI industry." He added that its cost-effective approach to AI model development "would likely spur companies worldwide to accelerate their own efforts ... breaking the stranglehold of the few dominant players in the field."

Analysts attribute DeepSeek's success to over a decade of substantial investment in research and computing power by its backer, quantitative hedge fund "High-Flyer". Between 2020 and 2021, Huanfang invested 1.2 billion yuan to establish two AI supercomputing clusters, which include approximately 10,000 Nvidia A100 chips.

Former employees of DeepSeek noted that the company's success is largely due to founder Liang Wenfeng's focus on more cost-effective AI architectures. DeepSeek has adopted technologies such as Mixture of Experts (MoE) and Multi-Head Latent Attention (MLA), significantly reducing computational costs.

The report also highlighted DeepSeek's flat management structure, which fosters a collaborative atmosphere. Founder Liang Wenfeng, described by former colleagues as low-key and introverted, prefers to dive into technical details alongside younger employees.

A former employee quoted in the report said, Liang gave us control and treated us as experts. He constantly asked questions and learned alongside us.

In general, DeepSeek looks to challenge industry giants and inspire global enterprises to accelerate their AI efforts once again, and this time, it may aim to completely shape the future of the AI industry.

data.title: NVIDIA (NVDA.US) and Cisco (CSCO.US) have strengthened their collaboration to jointly advance enterprise AI deployment and infrastructure optimization.
data.description:
Nvidia (NVDA.US) as the top supplier of new AI computer chips is expanding its partnership with networking equipment maker Cisco (CSCO.US) to make it easier for businesses to deploy AI systems, as many companies are still in the early stages of adopting AI due to the complexity the shift has added to data centers, the companies said in a joint statement.

Nvidia provides networking add-ons for its AI server gear called Spectrum-X Ethernet, and the companies said the product line will start to include Cisco chips that handle broader connectivity functions.

"Businesses are under immense pressure to deploy AI quickly and effectively, and many leaders are struggling to justify investments while balancing risk," Cisco CEO Chuck Robbins said in a statement. "Cisco and Nvidia are working together to remove barriers for our customers, ensuring they can optimize infrastructure investments and unleash the power of AI."

Typically, the construction of AI data centers is done mainly by the smallest group of the world's largest companies, known as hyperscale companies, such as Microsoft (MSFT.US) and Amazon (AMZN.US), which have massive engineering teams able to design and deploy machines.

Nvidia is hoping to expand the reach of the technology beyond its small group of customers and bring AI to a broader swath of the economy. A year ago, the company first teamed up with Cisco to try to reach a larger audience, including the networking company's biggest users — businesses and government.

For Cisco, the partnership with Nvidia is a way to grab a bigger slice of AI spending, which has been hard for the networking company to sell its gear to the hyperscale data centers. Nvidia's networking gear will include Cisco's Silicon One chips, which would give the product an edge in competing with Broadcom's widely used gear.

data.title: Crypto Fraud: Mastermind Sentenced to 11 Years for AA Chain Scam
data.description:
A Guangdong-based company has been accused of issuing a cryptocurrency as part of a fraudulent scheme, with the mastermind behind the operation sentenced to 11 years in prison. The case, which was recently concluded by a Guangdong court, involved a defendant named Jie who established a company and issued a virtual currency called "AA Chain," promising investors significant returns.

The court found that Jie had fabricated facts to defraud investors, with the primary goal of illegally acquiring their property. In May 2018, Jie founded the company in Guangdong and served as its legal representative. He promoted the "AA Coin" on an internet platform, claiming that it had appreciation potential and would be listed on an exchange, with expected returns of no less than 5 million RMB. An investor, believing these claims, invested 990,000 RMB to purchase over 1.6 million AA Coins. However, these tokens were consistently locked and unable to be traded.

The court determined that the defendant's actions constituted fraud, with a particularly large amount of property involved. Jie was ultimately convicted of fraud and sentenced to 11 years in prison, along with a fine of 50,000 RMB. The judgment is final, and this case serves as a stark reminder of the potential risks associated with investing in cryptocurrencies, particularly when dealing with unregulated or untrusted entities.

data.title: "Bitfinex Launches USDT0: Revolutionizing Cross-Chain Stablecoin Transfers"
data.description:
Bitfinex, a leading cryptocurrency exchange, has introduced USDT0, a novel stablecoin designed to enhance interoperability within the blockchain ecosystem. USDT0 is a bridged version of Tether's USDt stablecoin, enabling seamless transfers of stablecoins across different networks without relying on fragmented liquidity pools or traditional bridges.

USDT0 operates on a "lock-and-mint" mechanism, where USDt is locked on Ethereum while an equivalent amount of USDT0 is minted on the destination chain. This system is powered by LayerZero's Omnichain Fungible Token (OFT) standard, which facilitates secure and seamless cross-chain transfers. Unlike standard USDt, USDT0 is not directly issued or redeemable by Tether but is managed by Everdawn Labs, making it a distinct asset that requires users to swap between USDT0 and USDt through a conversion tool.

USDT0 aims to address interoperability challenges by enabling easier transfers of stablecoins across different networks. It has been introduced on blockchains such as Ink, Berachain, and MegaETH, with plans for expansion to additional networks. The OFT standard ensures that USDT0 maintains a 1:1 backing with USDt on Ethereum, and transfers are validated by a decentralized security model involving oracles and relayers. This approach reduces the complexity of cross-chain transactions while enhancing liquidity management.

One of the key distinctions of USDT0 is that it is not available for direct trading. Instead, it serves as a transport mechanism to facilitate the movement of USDt across different ecosystems. Users can deposit or withdraw USDT0 on supported exchanges, such as Bitfinex, and utilize a currency conversion tool to swap it for standard USDt. This design allows for the seamless use of USDt on networks where native issuance is not feasible, providing users with more flexibility without compromising the underlying backing of the stablecoin.

The introduction of USDT0 carries implications for both blockchain users and platforms. For users, it offers a more efficient and secure means of transferring stable value across chains, reducing the risks associated with third-party bridges. For exchanges and Decentralised Finance (DeFi) platforms, it simplifies integration and liquidity management by unifying stablecoin supply across multiple networks. While USDT0 reflects a growing focus on cross-chain interoperability, its distinction from standard USDt, particularly the

data.title: Matterport 2025 Winter Release: Productivity Multiplied Delivers The Next Leap in Property Marketing and Management
data.description:
The 2025 Winter Release of Matterport's digital twin technology and spatial data capture platform has brought about a significant leap in property marketing and management, empowering customers to work smarter, move faster, and drive stronger business results. Packed with powerful new features, AI-driven automation, and workflow-enhancing tools, this release sets a new standard for the digital transformation of the built world. Matterport's Chairman and CEO, RJ Pittman, emphasizes the game-changing impact of the 2025 Winter Release, stating, "The 2025 Winter Release is a game-changer for real estate professionals. We’re making it easier than ever to market, manage, and sell properties with AI-powered tools that save time and maximize impact."

Matterport Marketing Cloud: Streamlined Listing Process
One of the standout features of the 2025 Winter Release is the Matterport Marketing Cloud, which enables real estate agents to schedule a property to be digitized and receive a complete, ready-to-use digital marketing package within approximately 1 to 2 business days in most major metros. This streamlined listing process reduces the time it takes to get properties on the market, making it easier than ever for agents to market, manage, and sell properties. The digital marketing package includes a stunning 3D virtual tour, high-resolution images, a polished, social-media-ready video, AI-generated property descriptions, and detailed floor plans with precise room measurements, all powered by Matterport's Property Intelligence. Seamless MLS integration eliminates usual listing delays, helping agents get properties on the market faster with minimal effort.

Smarter Tagging Tools: Enhanced Efficiency and Documentation
The 2025 Winter Release introduces new enhancements to Matterport's tagging functionality, helping designers, architects, contractors, and property managers work more efficiently. Users can now copy annotations (tags) from one digital twin to another or import/export tags using CSV files, eliminating the need to recreate them manually. This is particularly valuable for long-term projects where maintaining consistent documentation across multiple scans is critical. Teams can also add field tags in real time while scanning, ensuring observations are recorded instantly and included in the final digital twin. These upgrades reduce the need for extra site visits, saving time and money compared to previous releases.

Faster Collaboration with New Multi-User Scanning: Merge
The new Merge functionality allows multiple users to scan a property at the same time and combine their work into a single digital twin. This dramatically reduces turnaround time for large or complex properties, enabling teams to capture spaces faster and work more efficiently. Whether scanning office buildings, multi-unit developments, or expansive retail spaces, teams can now collaborate in real-time, getting the job done in a fraction of the time compared to previous releases. This feature not only improves collaboration but also ensures that no areas are missed or overlooked, resulting in a more comprehensive and accurate digital twin of the property.

Declutter Any Space Instantly with Matterport's Defurnish Tool
Home sellers and agents can now remove clutter, excess furniture, or personal items from a space with a single click, making it easier for buyers to see a property's full potential. Users can also set the defurnished version of a 3D tour or still image as the default viewing experience. Coming soon, they will also be able to create highlight reels that showcase both furnished and defurnished views. Originally introduced in the 2024 Fall Release, defurnish is now fully available, giving real estate professionals a powerful way to present listings in their best light.

In conclusion, the 2025 Winter Release of Matterport's digital twin technology and spatial data capture platform delivers the next leap in property marketing and management. With its AI-driven automation, workflow-enhancing tools, and powerful new features, this release empowers customers to work smarter, move faster, and drive stronger business results. The Matterport Marketing Cloud streamlines the listing process, smarter tagging tools enhance efficiency and documentation, faster collaboration with new multi-user scanning improves turnaround time, and the defurnish tool helps real estate professionals present listings in their best light. As Matterport continues to innovate and push the boundaries of digital twin technology, it remains at the forefront of the digital transformation of the built world.

data.title: International Game Technology: Jackpot Slowdown Impacts Q4 Earnings
data.description:
International Game Technology (IGT) has reported its Q4 and full year 2024 financial results, missing earnings estimates amid a slowdown in jackpot activity. The company generated $651 million in Q4 revenue and $2.5 billion for the full year, driven by strong instant ticket and draw game sales across markets. However, the slowdown in jackpot activity impacted the company's earnings, with Q4 income from continuing operations reaching $116 million with a 17.9% margin, and full-year income at $271 million with a 10.8% margin.



IGT's Adjusted EBITDA for Q4 was $290 million with a 44.5% margin, and for the full year, it was $1.17 billion with a 46.6% margin. The company announced the $4.05 billion sale of its Gaming & Digital business to Apollo Global Management, expected to close by Q3 2025. IGT secured several significant lottery contracts, including a seven-year facilities management contract with Colorado Lottery and extensions in multiple jurisdictions.



For 2025, IGT expects revenue of $2.55-$2.65 billion and Adjusted EBITDA of $1.10-$1.15 billion. The Board declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per common share.

IGT's strategic transformation and solid financial performance position the company for future growth. The announced sale of its Gaming & Digital business to Apollo represents a watershed moment that will streamline operations and significantly strengthen the company's balance sheet. The company's financial performance remained solid with full-year revenue of $2.5 billion and Adjusted EBITDA of $1.17 billion, yielding an impressive 46.6% margin. This margin structure underscores the highly profitable nature of IGT's lottery operations, which feature recurring revenue streams and long-term contracts that provide exceptional visibility and stability.



The robust cash generation capabilities of IGT's lottery business are particularly noteworthy, with $1.03 billion in consolidated cash from operations and $659 million in free cash flow for 2024. This cash flow engine enables IGT to simultaneously invest in growth initiatives, reduce debt, and return capital to shareholders through its $0.20 quarterly dividend.

IGT's contract wins and extensions across multiple jurisdictions validate its market leadership and technology capabilities. These long-duration contracts create a formidable competitive moat and provide revenue stability that few businesses can match. The 2025 outlook reveals both near-term investments and long-term strategic positioning, with the company investing to secure its portfolio and extend contract durations beyond eight years, driving sustainable growth and shareholder returns.

The planned $2 billion debt reduction following the Gaming & Digital sale will transform IGT's capital structure, reducing leverage and interest expense while creating additional financial flexibility. This positions the company to potentially increase shareholder returns or pursue strategic acquisitions in the lottery space.

For investors, IGT now offers a clearer investment thesis as a pure-play lottery operator with predictable cash flows, long-term contracts, high margins, and a compelling growth profile in the low-to-mid single digits. While 2025 may be a transition year with elevated investments and the Italy Lotto license payment impacting reported cash flows, the underlying business fundamentals remain exceptionally strong.

data.title: Gladstone's Industrial Surge: Shares Soar 70%!
Bitcoin Tests $85K Support Amid $1B Liquidation Risk
data.description:
Bitcoin's price has been under pressure, approaching critical support levels, with potential long liquidations exceeding $1 billion. Recent price movements and ongoing ETF outflows have contributed to the bearish sentiment. Hong Yea, co-founder of GRVT, notes that the $85,000 level is crucial, as a break below this support could trigger further declines.

Analysts warn of significant risks as Bitcoin approaches the $85,000 support level. Increased market volatility suggests that a sustained drop below this mark could catalyze an extensive liquidation event, impacting over $1 billion in leveraged long positions across exchanges. The recent downturn has been exacerbated by a sharp increase in outflows from Bitcoin exchange-traded funds (ETFs), with a record net outflow of over $516 million reported on February 24, marking six consecutive days of selling.

Market sentiment remains cautious following Bitcoin's decline to a three-month low of approximately $87,629. This signals a robust bearish trend as the psychological support level of $90,000 was breached for the first time since mid-January. Ryan Lee, chief analyst at Bitget Research, identifies the diminishing risk appetite among crypto investors as a critical factor in the current sell-off. The lack of bullish catalysts raises concerns about Bitcoin's ability to regain its footing without a robust influx of investment.

Geopolitical uncertainties and broader economic conditions contribute to Bitcoin's fragile standing. Hong Yea emphasizes that geopolitical concerns, economic uncertainties, and unpredictable policy changes affecting broader business and economic issues could drag BTC below $85,000 in the short term. Additionally, the recent Bybit hack, the largest in crypto history with $1.4 billion in losses, adds to the existing market turmoil, although experts believe its long-term impact may be limited.

Traders and market participants will need to monitor Bitcoin's price movements closely as it tests these critical support levels. Potential rebounds could arise if market sentiment shifts positively. However, analysts caution that continued outflows from ETFs and external market pressures may keep the bears in control. In summary, Bitcoin is at a pivotal juncture where it faces significant risks of long liquidations if it cannot hold above the $85,000 mark. The current market volatility, compounded by outflows from ETFs and external economic pressures, poses substantial challenges

data.title: MicroStrategy Raises $2B for Bitcoin; OKX Settles with U.S. Authorities
data.description:
Crypto Roundup: February 25, 2025

In a significant development, MicroStrategy, formerly known as Strategy, raised $2 billion through a convertible note offering to purchase additional Bitcoin (BTC). While the headline figures are impressive, the reduced conversion premium and discounted pricing on a preferred stock offering in January have raised eyebrows among industry observers.

Prominent cryptocurrency exchange OKX has reached a settlement with U.S. authorities over its failure to secure the necessary licenses to operate as a money transmitter. The OKX affiliate, Aux Cayes Fintech Co. Ltd, has agreed to pay $500 million in penalties and forfeited fees. The settlement also resolves allegations of fraudulent and non-compliant activities at the exchange, which facilitated over $5 billion in suspicious transactions and criminal proceeds.

Ethereum developers deployed the Pectra upgrade on the Holesky test network at epoch 115,968, marking the first major step in stress-testing the upgrade before its launch on Ethereum's mainnet. However, the upgrade encountered technical challenges, with the network slot not yet finalized at the moment of activation. Ethereum developers are currently investigating the root cause of the issue.

The market is showing signs of fatigue regarding crypto-linked equity issuance. Various publicly-listed companies, including MicroStrategy, MARA Holdings, Core Scientific, and Riot Platforms, have resorted to issuing debt and/or equity to raise funds for additional BTC purchases. According to Bank of America, these offerings now account for roughly 19% of U.S. equity-linked issuance. Manoj Shivdasani, founder and head of research at GSR Research, has suggested that the recent pricing of these deals indicates market fatigue. Since the start of 2024, approximately $17 billion has been raised through equity-linked products by companies directly involved in the cryptocurrency space, raising concerns about potential market saturation.

The crypto market continues to evolve, with both challenges and opportunities presenting themselves. As the industry grows and matures, it is essential to stay informed about the latest developments and trends.

data.title: Diana Shipping Inc. Reports Strong Fourth Quarter, Declares Cash Dividend
data.description:
Diana Shipping Inc. (NYSE: DSX), a global shipping company specializing in the ownership and bareboat charter-in of dry bulk vessels, has reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended December 31, 2024. The company's net income for the fourth quarter was $9.7 million, up from $9.4 million in the same period last year. Earnings per share for the fourth quarter were $0.07 basic and $0.02 diluted, compared to $0.08 basic and $0.06 diluted in the same quarter of 2023. Time charter revenues for the fourth quarter were $57.1 million, down from $60.0 million in the same period last year, primarily due to decreased ownership days.

For the full year 2024, Diana Shipping reported net income of $12.7 million and net income attributed to common stockholders of $7.0 million. Time charter revenues for the full year were $228.2 million, down from $262.1 million in 2023. Earnings per share for 2024 were $0.06 basic and $0.05 diluted, compared to $0.44 basic and $0.42 diluted for 2023.

The company has declared a cash dividend on its common stock of $0.01 per share, based on the Company’s results of operations during the fourth quarter ended December 31, 2024. The cash dividend will be payable on March 21, 2025 to all common shareholders of record as of March 12, 2025. As of February 24, 2025, the Company has 113,763,924 common shares issued and outstanding and there were 6,394,709 warrants exercised.

Diana Shipping's fleet employment as of February 24, 2025, includes 9 Ultramax bulk carriers, 6 Panamax bulk carriers, 6 Kamsarmax bulk carriers, and 5 Post-Panamax bulk carriers, totaling 30 vessels. The company's fleet utilization rate was 99.9% during the fourth quarter of 2024.

Diana Shipping's strong fourth quarter and full year results demonstrate the company's ability to generate profit even in a challenging market environment. The company's high fleet utilization rate and stable liquidity position contribute to its overall financial stability and resilience in the face of market fluctuations. The declared cash dividend reflects the company's commitment to returning value to shareholders, even in a declining revenue environment.



In conclusion, Diana Shipping Inc. has reported strong financial results for the fourth quarter and year ended December 31, 2024, with a net income of $9.7 million and a cash dividend declaration of $0.01 per common share. The company's high fleet utilization rate and stable liquidity position contribute to its overall financial stability and resilience in the face of market fluctuations. Investors should consider Diana Shipping's strong performance and commitment to shareholder value when evaluating the company as a potential investment opportunity.

data.title: SunCar's Digital Solutions Enhance Dealer Competitiveness
data.description:
SunCar Technology Group Inc. (NASDAQ: SDA), a leading innovator in cloud-based B2B auto services and auto e-insurance in China, recently participated in the National Automotive Circulation Industry New Year Forum and Consumer Promotion Conference in Beijing. The company, serving as a vice president unit of the National Automotive Circulation Industry Association, showcased its technological solutions that help dealers enhance customer retention, renewal rates, and profitability. This article explores the digital solutions SunCar presented at the forum and their potential impact on the automotive industry.

SunCar's participation in the forum reflects its strategic positioning in the Chinese automotive market, providing an opportunity to engage with key stakeholders and showcase its innovative offerings. The company's digital solutions address the unique challenges faced by automotive dealers in China, such as the need for seamless customer lifecycle management, efficient resource allocation, and the integration of digital services into the overall customer experience.

One of the key digital solutions SunCar showcased at the forum is its "SunCarInsurance" platform. This platform helps dealers enhance customer retention, renewal rates, and profitability by integrating auto insurance into customer lifecycle management. The platform enables dealers to implement seamless sales and after-sales management, improving customer retention and remarketing efficiency. Additionally, SunCar's "Car Butler" service and cloud-based customer service platform provide comprehensive dealer support, enhancing customer satisfaction and loyalty.

SunCar's AI-powered infrastructure has been instrumental in optimizing service delivery and resource allocation. The company's advanced insurance renewal system now serves over 2 million owners of electric vehicles, demonstrating its technological capabilities and market reach. This digital transformation sets new standards for efficiency and customer service in the automotive sector.

Another significant development is SunCar's plan to extend its geographical footprint and deepen technology integration by incorporating its specialized automotive services directly into the EV manufacturer's owner platform. This integration will create a seamless experience for millions of vehicle owners, representing a significant step forward in digital automotive service delivery.

SunCar's digital solutions contribute to enhancing dealer competitiveness by providing comprehensive support and improving customer satisfaction, loyalty, and retention. These offerings can lead to increased renewal rates, claim rates, and service retention, ultimately contributing to improved profitability for dealers. By addressing the unique characteristics of each market segment, SunCar's tailored solutions create synergies that benefit the broader automotive industry.

In conclusion, SunCar's participation in the National Automotive Circulation Industry Forum and its showcase of digital solutions for dealers reflect the company's strategic positioning in the Chinese automotive market. These solutions address the unique challenges faced by automotive dealers in China and contribute to enhancing dealer competitiveness, ultimately driving sustainable growth and innovation in the industry.
